creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
jadawin     2008-03-12 09:15:36 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    converters           Makefile 
  Added files:
    converters/pdf2djvu  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  pdf2djvu creates DjVu files from PDF files. It's able to extract:
  graphics, text layer, hyperlinks, document outline (bookmarks), and
  metadata.
  
  WWW: http://code.google.com/p/pdf2djvu/
  
  PR:             ports/121463
  Submitted by:   Denise H. G. <darcsis at gmail.com>
  Approved by:    thierry@ (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.144     +1 -0      ports/converters/Makefile
  1.1       +40 -0     ports/converters/pdf2djvu/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/converters/pdf2djvu/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/converters/pdf2djvu/pkg-descr (new)
